description: One spec-level openApi description shared by MULTIPLE tests must resolve and run identically for every test. Exercises the per-run loadDescription memoization (item 3.3): resolveSpec dereferences the description once, then each test reuses it instead of re-reading + re-dereferencing the same document. Hermetic: mockResponse means no network call.

tests.description: first test resolves the shared description

steps.description: getUsers via the shared spec-level openApi description

tests.description: second test reuses the same description (memoized, not re-loaded)

steps.description: getUsers again through the reused description

tests.description: third test also reuses the same description

steps.description: addUser resolves through the same memoized description
